title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Wilderness Lodges India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Wilderness Lodges India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Wilderness Lodges India are looking for an experienced Reservation Manager based out of Indore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Wilderness Lodges India:
Wilderness Lodges India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Opera PMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wilderness Lodges India!
